releases.label: DR2
releases.summary: Second zCOSMOS-bright release (the '10k sample', October 2008): 10,643 VIMOS spectra of I_AB < 22.5 galaxies in the COSMOS field, corresponding to the catalog presented in Lilly et al. 2009. Migrated to ESO Phase 3 in February 2014; superseded by DR3.

releases.label: DR3
releases.summary: Final release of zCOSMOS-bright (the '20k sample'): 20,689 VIMOS MR-grism (R~600, 5550-9450 A) spectra of an I_AB < 22.5 magnitude-limited sample across the whole 1.7 deg2 COSMOS field, from ~600 hours of VLT time (2005-2010) under LP 175.A-0839, with confidence classes for each redshift. DR3 redshifts are shifted by -100 km/s (dz = -0.0003(1+z)) relative to DR1/DR2. ESO Phase 3 release DOI 10.18727/archive/73; published 2015-11-04 (ESO catalogue reference: Lilly et al. 2009).
